200.description: Return a welcome message and links to the API documentation.

get.summary: Welcome to the Overture Maps API

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude coordinate. Required if country code is not provided.

parameters.name: lng
parameters.description: Longitude coordinate. Required if country code is not provided.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Search radius in meters, defaulting to 1000 meters if not provided.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit on the number of results returned, defaulting to 1000 if not provided.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (0-indexed), used together with `limit` as the page size. Responses include Pagination-Count (total matching results), Pagination-Page and Pagination-Limit headers. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format, defaulting to JSON. Options are "json", "csv", or "geojson".

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Array of fields to include in the properties field of the response, provided as a comma-separated string. Any fields not in the list will be excluded from the properties object. This is used to make the response lighter so your application is faster.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166 country code consisting of 2 characters. Required if lat/lng are not provided.

parameters.description: ISO 3166 country code consisting of 2 characters. Required if lat/lng are not provided.
parameters.name: country

parameters.description: Filter places to only those with a source dataset matching this value.
parameters.name: source

parameters.description: Wikidata brand ID associated with the place.
parameters.name: brand_wikidata

parameters.description: Brand name associated with the place.
parameters.name: brand_name

parameters.description: Minimum confidence score for the places to be returned, defaulting to 0.5 if not provided.
parameters.name: min_confidence

parameters.description: Array of category names, provided as a comma-separated string. Matches the legacy Overture categories vocabulary and the newer taxonomy/basic_category vocabulary.
parameters.name: categories

parameters.description: Array of Overture taxonomy categories, provided as a comma-separated string. Matches the primary category or any ancestor in the taxonomy hierarchy, so e.g. "food_and_drink" matches every descendant category.
parameters.name: taxonomy

parameters.description: Filter by operating status, e.g. "open" or "permanently_closed". Places without signals have a null operating status and are excluded when this filter is used.
parameters.name: operating_status

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of enrichment fields to include. Use "brand" for Wikidata-sourced brand details (logo, website, industry, parent) on branded places.
parameters.name: enrichment_fields

get.summary: Get Transportation segments using Query params as filters

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude coordinate. Required if no country, name or bbox filter is provided.

parameters.name: lng
parameters.description: Longitude coordinate. Required if no country, name or bbox filter is provided.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Search radius in meters, defaulting to 1000 meters if not provided.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit on the number of results returned, defaulting to 1000 if not provided.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (0-indexed), used together with `limit` as the page size. Responses include Pagination-Count (total matching results), Pagination-Page and Pagination-Limit headers. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format, defaulting to JSON. Options are "json", "csv", or "geojson".

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Array of fields to include in the properties field of the response, provided as a comma-separated string. Any fields not in the list will be excluded from the properties object. This is used to make the response lighter so your application is faster.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166 country code consisting of 2 characters. Required if lat/lng are not provided.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring match against the division primary name and English common name. Also matches an exact division ID.

parameters.name: subtype
parameters.description: Filter by division subtype, provided as a comma-separated list (e.g. "county,locality").

parameters.name: admin_level
parameters.description: Filter by admin_level — the division's position in its country's hierarchy (0 = country). Provided as a comma-separated list (e.g. "1,2").

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Bounding box filter as "xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax" (lng/lat order). Returns divisions whose bounding box intersects it.

parameters.name: include_geometry
parameters.description: Whether to include the full polygon geometry in each result. Defaults to false for name searches (fetch geometry via GET /divisions/{id}) and true otherwise. Division polygons can be megabytes each, so leave this off for search boxes.

get.summary: Get Division areas using Query params as filters

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Overture division area ID

get.summary: Get a single Division area by ID, including its full polygon geometry

info.title: Overture Maps API Documentation
info.description: OpenAPI docs for the Overture Maps API

primary.description: Primary taxonomy category of the place.

hierarchy.description: Full taxonomy hierarchy path from the top-level category to the primary category.

alternates.description: Alternate taxonomy categories for the place.

rules.description: Naming rules or variants associated with the place.

names.description: Names associated with the brand, usually Primary is the most useful

ext_logo_url.description: Brand logo URL (Wikimedia Commons, resizable with ?width=N). Sourced from Wikidata (CC0).

ext_website.description: Official brand website. Sourced from Wikidata (CC0).

ext_industry.description: Industry of the brand. Sourced from Wikidata (CC0).

ext_parent.description: Parent organisation of the brand. Sourced from Wikidata (CC0).

ext_wikidata_label.description: English label of the brand on Wikidata (CC0).

record_id.description: Unique identifier for the record in the dataset.

rules.description: Naming rules or variants associated with the place.

basic_category.description: Basic category of the place from the Overture taxonomy (schema v1.15+).

taxonomy.description: Overture places taxonomy classification (schema v1.15+). Replaces `categories` upstream from September 2026; both are provided here.

operating_status.description: Operating status of the place, e.g. "open" or "permanently_closed". Null when no signals are present.

socials.description: Social media links associated with the place.

phones.description: Phone numbers associated with the place.

version.description: Version number of the place data.

sources.description: Source information for the place data.

ext_brand.description: Wikidata-sourced brand details (CC0). Present when enrichment_fields includes "brand" and the place has a brand with a Wikidata QID.

properties.description: Properties and additional details of the place.

places.description: Number of places in this Country

brands.description: Number of brands that are associated with the Country

country.description: The ISO code of the Country.

ext_counts.description: Counts related to the Country e.g. how many Places and Brands are associated with it

places.description: Number of places with this Category

brands.description: Number of brands that are associated with the Categorys

ext_counts.description: Counts related to the Category e.g. how many Places and Brands are associated with it

id.description: Unique identifier of the base feature.

geometry.description: Geometric representation of the base feature.

id.description: Unique identifier of the transportation segment.

names.description: Names of the division, including common names keyed by language code

admin_level.description: Position of the division in its country's hierarchy, e.g. 0 (country), 1, 2.

is_land.description: Whether the area represents land (vs maritime).

is_territorial.description: Whether the area includes territorial waters.

division_id.description: ID of the division feature this area belongs to.

ext_geometry_source.description: Set when this record's own geometry is missing upstream and the boundary was served from a sibling area of the same division; the value is the sibling's class, e.g. "maritime" (land plus territorial waters).

id.description: Unique identifier of the division area.

bbox.description: Bounding box of the division area.

geometry.description: Geometric representation of the division area. Omitted when include_geometry resolves to false; fetch it via GET /divisions/{id}.
